name: Location-Driven Narrative Strategy
consequences: Immediate: Hyper-local Hong Kong settings create visceral tension → Systemic: 25% faster scaling through authentic architectural storytelling → Strategic: Risks alienating non-local audiences if visual metaphors remain too culturally specific
options: Prioritize real-world Hong Kong locations for organic atmosphere
Build hybrid sets replicating key districts with modular design
Implement AI-generated environment mapping for dynamic spatial illusions
review: Controls Authenticity vs. Production Flexibility. Weakness: The options fail to consider the logistical complexity of filming in constantly evolving urban landscapes.

name: Surveillance System Integration Framework
